The '''trace-breather cartridge''' was a [[Life support/Legends|life-support]] device that slowly delivered limited amounts of breathable gases for a long period of [[Time/Legends|time]].<ref name="CSWE" /> It could not provide full [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] for the user like an air tank, but was useful in environments that were beginning to collapse.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Skin Deep: The Fat Dancer's Tale|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} {{1st}}
